name: ac-ana-curve-shop
description: E-commerce completo de Moda Plus Size

scripts.install:all: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.build: cd frontend && npm install && npm run build
scripts.start: cd backend && npm install && npx prisma generate && node src/server.js
scripts.prisma:migrate: cd backend && npx prisma migrate deploy

author: AC Ana Curve Shop
